nasb.text: You have increased your traders more than the stars of heaven— The creeping locust strips and flies away.

esv.text: You increased your merchants more than the stars of the heavens. The locust spreads its wings and flies away.

cnv.text: 你增加了你的商人， 多過天上的星辰。 蚱蜢退了殼，就飛去了。

ccb.text: 你的商贾多过天上的繁星， 但他们像吃光后飞去的蝗虫。
